- We take all reasonable and appropriate security measures to protect all Personal Data collected from loss, theft, misuse, unauthorized access,
disclosure, alteration and destruction, keeping in mind the nature of the data we store and the risks associated with the special category of Personal
Data we collect (health information). These measures include pseudonymization and tokenization of certain categories of Personal Data.
